name: squad-build
description: Reference implementation and documentation for building AMESA agents and simulators using the AMESA SDK.

schemas.description: Precise interface contracts for every buildable AMESA component. Ground-truth API references for code generation and review.

files.README.md: Index and quick-decision guide for all schemas
files.data-flow.md: End-to-end data pipeline overview — read first
files.teacher.md: SkillTeacher — RL reward / success / termination contract
files.goals.md: Goal subclasses — declarative alternative to Teacher
files.agent.md: Agent — top-level builder that wires everything together

distilled_docs.description: Condensed, LLM-friendly documentation covering all major AMESA SDK concepts.

files.core_concepts.md: Core concepts and mental model for the AMESA SDK
files.workflow.md: Development workflow from sim to trained agent
files.simulator_environment.md: How to build and connect simulators
files.teachers_skills.md: Teachers and skills — RL training contracts

direct_docs.description: Raw SDK documentation fetched directly from the AMESA developer portal.

establish-a-simulation-environment.description: Guides for setting up and connecting simulators to AMESA.

full_example.description: Complete end-to-end AMESA example: a greenhouse climate simulator paired with a multi-skill agent.

agent.description: Agent-side code: skills, perceptors, teacher, and training runner.

files.build_agent.py: Assembles and registers the Agent with all skills and perceptors
files.perceptors.py: Perceptor implementations for the greenhouse agent
files.teacher.py: SkillTeacher — reward, success, and termination logic
files.run_training_local.py: Entry point for running a training job locally

sim.description: Simulator-side code: ServerAmesa implementation, scenarios, and local runner.

files.server_impl.py: ServerAmesa subclass wiring the sim to AMESA gRPC
files.run_local.py: Entry point for running the simulator locally

files.run.md: Instructions to build Docker image and run training

root_files.README.md: Developer getting-started guide (SSH key, pyenv, venv setup)
root_files..mcp.json: MCP server config pointing to https://api.amesa.com/v1/mcp

module_roots.amesa_core: Core SDK — Agent, Skill, Sensor, Scenario, SkillTeacher, SkillController, SkillCoach
module_roots.composabl_core: Alternate import root for older SDK paths (same package)
